Neo Chen
                                           917-929-6622 | neochendev@gmail.com | LinkedIn | Github | New York, NY


WORK EXPERIENCE - 5+YOE
AVO | Full Stack Staff Engineer                                                                                      Mar 2021 - Present	                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
Lead engineer for all U.S.-based integration initiatives, owning system design, implementation, and deployment for complex, large-scale integrations.
Architected and built scalable, secure backend services and APIs supporting integrations with major enterprise systems including Epic, Samsung Health, Cerner, Fresenius, Meditech, Athena Health, and others.
Designed distributed, event-driven systems to handle high-volume healthcare data exchange with strong guarantees around reliability, fault tolerance, and data integrity.
Served as technical owner for Fortune 500 partnerships, leading architecture discussions, onboarding, and long-term platform evolution.
Drove frontend and backend code quality, modularization, and refactoring, improving maintainability and long-term scalability.
Mentored junior and mid-level engineers, contributing to technical direction, architectural standards, and best practices.
Troubleshot and resolved complex production issues across distributed systems, APIs, and data pipelines, ensuring high availability and system reliability.
Impact: Enabled integrations supporting 60,000+ healthcare providers, directly contributing to revenue growth, platform adoption, and customer retention.

PROJECTS 
SpacesAI  | AI-driven Interior Design app                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
Developed the product end-to-end, from ideation to launch, focusing on AI-driven interior design solutions.
Refactored the entire codebase for improved readability, maintainability, and scalability.
Built robust API endpoints to support core app features and seamless user experience.
Built a DynamoDB-based architecture for storing purchases and subscriptions
Developed Python backend AI agents to power image generation and design suggestions.
DeepPurpleAI  | Personalized AI assistant app    
Designed and developed a personalized AI assistant to support daily fitness tracking, workout planning, and routine optimization.
Built AI-powered features to guide step-by-step problem-solving for LeetCode challenges and technical interviews.
Developed an intelligent resume improvement tool to analyze resumes and generate actionable feedback for stronger job applications.
Engineered and integrated multiple AI models to deliver real-time, personalized recommendations across fitness, coding, and career tasks.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
SKILLS
Development: ReactJS, TypeScript, Redux, Jotai, Next.js, Java, Python, Django, AWS (Lambda, S3, DynamoDB), Firebase, Azure AD, SAML, RESTful APIs, SQL (PostgreSQL, MySQL), NoSQL (DynamoDB, MongoDB), Object-Oriented Programming (OOP), Functional Programming, Jest,  React Testing Library, Cypress, Storybook, Datadog, Sentry, Mixpanel, Tailwind CSS, DaisyUI, Docker, Agile, Git, CI/CD (GitHub Actions)
Architectural Patterns: Serverless Architecture, Event-Driven Architecture, RESTful Architecture


EDUCATION
CUNY Brooklyn College |  Bachelor of Science  in Computer Science                                                   2015-2020
Udacity  |  Java Web Developer Nano Degree                                                                                             2020-2021
